OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Fetches information required to display the application summary in the PSSShowApplicationSummaryAndActions FlexCard.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: FetchApplicationSummaryInformation

omniProcessElements.name: CalculateBenefitAmount
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "ExpressionSetAction1", "remoteClass" : "devopsimpkg11.PricingMatrixCalculationService", "remoteMethod" : "calculate", "remoteOptions" : { "actionContextCode" : "%ContextId%", "configurationName" : "PSSExpCloud_CalculateBenefitAmount", "explainabilitySpecName" : "BenefitApplicationLogs" }, "responseJSONNode" : "EligibleBenefitAmount", "responseJSONPath" : "output:calculationResults:NetBenefitAmount", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "input", "sendJSONPath" : "CalculateBenefitAmountInput", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: CalculateBenefitAmountForBenefitAssignmentLogs
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "GetParentIA:ParentApplicationId != NULL", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "ExpressionSetAction1", "remoteClass" : "devopsimpkg11.PricingMatrixCalculationService", "remoteMethod" : "calculate", "remoteOptions" : { "actionContextCode" : "%FetchBenefitAssignmentsFromIA:BenefitAssignment:Id%", "configurationName" : "PSSExpCloud_CalculateBenefitAmount", "explainabilitySpecName" : "BenefitApplicationLogs" }, "responseJSONNode" : "EligibleBenefitAmount", "responseJSONPath" : "output:calculationResults:NetBenefitAmount", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "input", "sendJSONPath" : "CalculateBenefitAmountInput", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: CalculateBenefitAmountInput
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "AreThereChildrenInTheHousehold" : "=%AreThereChildMember%", "AreThereDisabledHouseholdMembers" : "=%AreThereDisabledMember%", "AreThereElderlyHouseholdMembers" : "=%AreThereElderlyMember%", "ChildCareAmount" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:ChildCareAmount),0,%TransformedAQR:GenericData:ChildCareAmount%)", "ChildSupportAmount" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:ChildSupportAmount),0,%TransformedAQR:GenericData:ChildSupportAmount%)", "GarnishmentsAmount" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:GarnishmentsAmount),0,%TransformedAQR:GenericData:GarnishmentsAmount%)", "InputHouseholdSize" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformMemberDetails:MemberDetails),0,LISTSIZE(TransformMemberDetails:MemberDetails))", "InsurancePremiumAmount" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:InsurancePremiumAmount),0,%TransformedAQR:GenericData:InsurancePremiumAmount%)", "MedicalExpensesAmount" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:MedicalExpensesAmount),0,%TransformedAQR:GenericData:MedicalExpensesAmount%)", "PrimaryHeatType" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:PrimaryHeatType),\"None\",%TransformedAQR:GenericData:PrimaryHeatType%)", "PrimaryHeatingBillAmount" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:PrimaryHeatingBillAmount),0,%TransformedAQR:GenericData:PrimaryHeatingBillAmount%)", "ReimbursementAmount" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:ReimbursementAmount),0,%TransformedAQR:GenericData:ReimbursementAmount%)", "RepresentativePayeeFees" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:RepresentativePayeeFees),0,%TransformedAQR:GenericData:RepresentativePayeeFees%)", "SecondaryHeatType" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:SecondaryHeatType),\"None\",%TransformedAQR:GenericData:SecondaryHeatType%)", "SecondaryHeatingBillAmount" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:SecondaryHeatingBillAmount),0,%TransformedAQR:GenericData:SecondaryHeatingBillAmount%)", "SpousalSupportAmount" : "=IF(ISBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:SpousalSupportAmount),0,%TransformedAQR:GenericData:SpousalSupportAmount%)", "TotalHouseholdIncome" : "=%TotalHouseholdIncome%" }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: CalculateTotalExpense
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "TotalExpense" : "=%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:MedicalExpensesAmount% + %CalculateBenefitAmountInput:InsurancePremiumAmount% + %CalculateBenefitAmountInput:RepresentativePayeeFees% + %CalculateBenefitAmountInput:ChildCareAmount% + %CalculateBenefitAmountInput:GarnishmentsAmount% + %CalculateBenefitAmountInput:SpousalSupportAmount% + %CalculateBenefitAmountInput:PrimaryHeatingBillAmount% + %CalculateBenefitAmountInput:SecondaryHeatingBillAmount%" }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues9", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: CurrentMembers
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "UnremovedMembers" : "=FILTER(LIST(TransformedAQR:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails), 'ActionType != \"Remove\"')" }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues22", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: FetchAssessmentId
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchAssessmentId1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "ContextId", "inputParam" : "RecordId" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: FetchBenefitAssignmentsFromIA
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "FetchBenefitAssignmentsFromIA1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "ContextId", "inputParam" : "IAId" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction6", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: FetchCurrentBenefits
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "RecordId" : "=%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "disableChainable" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "integrationProcedureKey" : "BenefitManagement_FetchCurrentBenefits", "label" : "IntegrationProcedureAction1", "remoteOptions" : { }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "ExpressionSetName" : "PSSExpCloud_CalculateBenefitAmount", "IndividualApplicationSubmissionDate" : "=%FetchIndividualApplicationSubmissionDate:IACreationDate%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchActiveExpressionSetVersionByRank1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction4", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSDRFetchImportantFieldsCount1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "ContextId", "inputParam" : "id" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction6", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { "IndividualApplicationId" : "=%ContextId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchApplicationSubmissionDate1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction3", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSFetchContentDocumentsCount1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSGetParentIA1", "chainOnStep" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "element" : "ContextId", "inputParam" : "individualApplicationId" } ], "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "Parent", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: householdactiontype
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "ishouseholdactiontype" : false }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues20", "responseJSONNode" : "Arehouseholdactiontype", "responseJSONPath" : "ishouseholdactiontype", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "isincomeactiontype" : false }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues21", "responseJSONNode" : "Areisincomeactiontype", "responseJSONPath" : "isincomeactiontype", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: InitAreThereChildMember
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "isChild" : false }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues2", "responseJSONNode" : "AreThereChildMember", "responseJSONPath" : "isChild", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: InitAreThereDisabledMember
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "isDisabled" : false }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues2", "responseJSONNode" : "AreThereDisabledMember", "responseJSONPath" : "isDisabled", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: InitAreThereElderlyMember
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "isElder" : false }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues2", "responseJSONNode" : "AreThereElderlyMember", "responseJSONPath" : "isElder", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: InitTotalHouseholdIncome
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "HouseholdIncome" : "=0" }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues2", "responseJSONNode" : "TotalHouseholdIncome", "responseJSONPath" : "HouseholdIncome", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: LoopHouseholdIncomeDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "LoopBlock1", "loopList" : "TransformedAQR:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails", "loopOutput" : { }, "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: LoopHouseholdMemberDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(TransformedAQR:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails|1:HouseholdMemberFirstName)", "label" : "LoopBlock2", "loopList" : "TransformedAQR:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails", "loopOutput" : { }, "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSCoCAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "FetchIndividualApplicationStatus:ApplicationType == \"ChangeOfCircumstance\" || FetchIndividualApplicationStatus:ApplicationType == \"Recertification\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "TransformedAQR", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "ReadExpenseAndHeating:AssessmentDataReturned", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: ReadExpenseAndHeating
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "remoteClass" : "DiscoveryFrmwrk.PreFillAssessment", "remoteMethod" : "", "remoteOptions" : { }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "RemoteActionAssessmentId", "sendJSONPath" : "FetchAssessmentId:RemoteActionAssessmentId", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: RespondWithApplicationSummaryInformation
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "additionalOutput" : { }, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "ResponseAction1", "responseDefaultData" : { }, "responseFormat" : "JSON", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "SetApplicationSummaryInformation:Output", "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true, "vlcResponseHeaders" : { } }

omniProcessElements.name: SetApplicationSummaryInformation
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "Output" : { "ChangeOfCircumstancesReportChangeIncome" : "%TransformedAQR:GenericData:ChangeOfCircumstancesReportChangeIncome%", "ChangeOfCircumstancesReportChangeMember" : "%TransformedAQR:GenericData:ChangeOfCircumstancesReportChangeMember%", "EligibleBenefitAmount" : "%EligibleBenefitAmount%", "ExpenseDetailsString" : "%SetExpenseDetails:ExpenseDetails%", "ExpressionSetName" : "PSSExpCloud_CalculateBenefitAmount", "ExpressionSetVersion" : "%FetchExpressionSetVersionInformation:ExpressionSetVersion%", "FetchCurrentBenefits" : "%FetchCurrentBenefits%", "FetchImportantFieldsCount" : "%FetchImportantFieldsCount%", "HouseholdIncomeDetails" : "%TransformedAQR:GenericData:HouseholdIncomeDetails%", "HouseholdMemberDetails" : "%TransformedAQR:GenericData:HouseholdMemberDetails%", "IndividualApplicationSubmissionDate" : "%FetchIndividualApplicationSubmissionDate:IACreationDate%", "NumberOfDocuments" : "%GetContentDocumentCount:NumberOfDocuments%", "ParticipantDetails" : "%TransformMemberDetails:MemberDetails%", "TotalExpense" : "%CalculateTotalExpense:TotalExpense%", "TotalIncome" : "%TotalHouseholdIncome%", "TotalParticipant" : "%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:InputHouseholdSize%", "householdactiontype" : "%Arehouseholdactiontype%", "incomeactiontype" : "%Areisincomeactiontype%" } }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues8", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: SetExpenseDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "elementValueMap" : { "ExpenseDetails" : "SpousalSupportAmount|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:SpousalSupportAmount%#AreThereElderlyHouseholdMembers|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:AreThereElderlyHouseholdMembers%#InputHouseholdSize|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:InputHouseholdSize%#PrimaryHeatingBillAmount|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:PrimaryHeatingBillAmount%#InsurancePremiumAmount|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:InsurancePremiumAmount%#TotalHouseholdIncome|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:TotalHouseholdIncome%#MedicalExpensesAmount|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:MedicalExpensesAmount%#AreThereChildrenInTheHousehold|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:AreThereChildrenInTheHousehold%#PrimaryHeatType|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:PrimaryHeatType%#RepresentativePayeeFees|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:RepresentativePayeeFees%#SecondaryHeatType|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:SecondaryHeatType%#ChildCareAmount|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:ChildCareAmount%#ChildSupportAmount|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:ChildSupportAmount%#AreThereDisabledHouseholdMembers|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:AreThereDisabledHouseholdMembers%#ReimbursementAmount|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:ReimbursementAmount%#SecondaryHeatingBillAmount|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:SecondaryHeatingBillAmount%#GarnishmentsAmount|%CalculateBenefitAmountInput:GarnishmentsAmount%" }, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "label" : "SetValues10", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "show" : null }

omniProcessElements.name: TransformAssessmentQuestionResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSAssignGenericNamesToResponseNode1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "FetchIndividualApplicationStatus:ApplicationType != \"ChangeOfCircumstance\" && FetchIndividualApplicationStatus:ApplicationType != \"Recertification\"", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "responseJSONNode" : "TransformedAQR", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "ReadExpenseAndHeating:AssessmentDataReturned", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: TransformMemberDetails
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "bundle" : "PSSTransformMemberDetailsForDisplay1", "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "ignoreCache" : false, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction2", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "MemberDetails", "sendJSONPath" : "CurrentMembers:UnremovedMembers", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "description" : "", "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "labelPlural" : "", "labelSingular" : "", "linkToExternalObject" : "", "mockResponseMap" : { }, "nameColumn" : "", "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "rollbackOnError" : true, "trackingCustomData" : { }, "ttlMinutes" : 5 }
